label: Haplotype projection from pedigree
notes: relationship_type (dyad|triad) is a runtime parameter, not a registry row. Per-variant projection_source ∈ {parent_homozygous, parent_heterozygous_phased, parent_heterozygous_unphased}; per-segment confidence ∈ {Gold, Silver, Bronze}.

label: Per-gene haplotype-resolved status
notes: Damaging set follows KBC §1.8 tier (Tier 1 / 2 / 3) selected at runtime. Segment confidence (Gold/Silver/Bronze) and per-variant projection_source propagated into the gene-status row.

label: Per-relationship transmission summary
notes: relationship_type (dyad|triad) runtime param. Triad rows carry full Mendelian + n_de_novo_candidates; dyad rows carry partial Mendelian (parent-hom sites only). No family-hub aggregation under any scope.

label: HPP × KBC arrangement-assignment cross-check
notes: Runs only on variants where both HPP and KBC have made an assignment. Discordances expected at inversion edges and in Bronze segments; reported as diagnostic, not primary result.

label: HPP per-offspring pipeline (chain)
notes: Chains Stage 2 pedigree set → Stage 3 maps → haplotype_projection → offspring_gene_status. Optional terminal blocs: transmission_summary, hpp_kbc_arrangement_crosscheck. Headline product is hpp_offspring_gene_status (manuscript supplementary table). Three-cohort rule absolute: 226-sample pure C. gariepinus hatchery only.
